zh.Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Franc: 法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯
zh.Moreton Say, Shropshire, England: 英國史洛普爾莫雷頓 賽
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord Richard de Sandford II於1301年出生在英國多瑟特桑德福德時，他的父親Lord of Sandford Richard Sanford46歲，母親Agnes de Saye43歲。他於大約1338年與Isabel在英國史洛普爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他於1424年在英國英格蘭史洛普爾被列為sheriff of shropshire。他去世於1348年在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯享年47歲。

zh-hans.Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Franc: 法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯
zh-hans.Moreton Say, Shropshire, England: 英国史洛普爾莫雷頓 賽
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord Richard de Sandford II于1301年出生在英国多瑟特桑德福德时，他的父亲Lord of Sandford Richard Sanford46岁，母亲Agnes de Saye43岁。他于大约1338年与Isabel在英国史洛普爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他于1424年在英国英格兰史洛普爾被列为sheriff of shropshire。他去世于1348年在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sandford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places in England with names derived from Old English sand ‘sand’ + ford ‘ford, river crossing’, such as Sandford in Warcop (Westmorland), Sandford in Sonning and Dry Sandford in Abingdon (both Berkshire), Sandford on Thames and Sandford Saint Martin (both Oxfordshire), Great and Little Sampford (Essex), Sandford Orcas (Dorset), Sandford, Sampford Courtney, Sampford Peverell, and Sampford Spiney (all Devon), Sampford Arundel and Sampford Brett (both Somerset), and Sandford (Shropshire). See also Sandiford .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord Richard de Sandford II was born in 1301, in Sandford, Dorset, England, his father, Lord of Sandford Richard Sanford, was 46 and his mother, Agnes de Saye, was 43. He married Isabel about 1338, in Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. In 1424, his occupation is listed as sheriff of shropshire in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. He died in 1348, in Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord Richard de Sandford II est né en 1301, à Sandford, Dorset, Angleterre, son père, Lord of Sandford Richard Sanford, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Saye, avait 43 ans. Il a épousé Isabel environ 1338, à Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. En 1424, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of shropshire à Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé en 1348, à Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord Richard de Sandford II 1301 in Sandford, Dorset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord of Sandford Richard Sanford 46 und seine Mutter Agnes de Saye 43. Er hat um 1338 in Shropshire, England Isabel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. 1424 ist sein Beruf als sheriff of shropshire in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb 1348 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Richard de Sandford II è nato il nel 1301 nel Sandford, Dorset, England, il suo padre, Lord of Sandford Richard Sanford, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Agnes de Saye, aveva 43 anni. Lui sposato Isabel circa 1338, nel Shropshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Nel 1424, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of shropshire nel Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì nel 1348, nel Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.Sandford, Dorset, England: イギリスドールセトサンドフォード
ja.lifeSummary: Lord Richard de Sandford IIが1301年にイギリスドールセトサンドフォードで生まれた時，父Lord of Sandford Richard Sanfordは46歳，母Agnes de Sayeは43歳であった。約1338年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアでIsabelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。1424年，イギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアでの職業はsheriff of shropshireと記録されている。彼は1348年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord Richard de Sandford II(이)가 1301년 영국 도르세트 샌드퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord of Sandford Richard Sanford(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Saye(은)는 43세였다. 그는 대략 1338년 영국 슈럽실르에서 Isabel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 1424년, 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에서 sheriff of shropshire이었다. 그는 1348년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Richard de Sandford II nasceu em 1301, em Sandford, Dorset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord of Sandford Richard Sanford, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Saye, tinha 43 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel aproximadamente 1338, em Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Em 1424, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of shropshire em Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 1348, em Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord Richard de Sandford II родился в 1301 г. в местности сэндфорд, дорсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Lord of Sandford Richard Sanford было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Saye, 43. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel около 1338 г. в местности шропшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. В 1424 году он работал по профессии sheriff of shropshire в местности шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер в 1348 г. в местности пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lord Richard de Sandford II nació en 1301, en Sandford, Dorset, Inglaterra, su papá, Lord of Sandford Richard Sanford, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Agnes de Saye, tenía 43 años. Se casó con Isabel aproximadamente 1338, en Shropshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. En 1424, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of shropshire en Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió en 1348, en Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, a la edad de 47 años.
